chunks.text: University of California at Berkeley Department of Electrical Engineering & Computer Sciences Instructional & Electronics Support Group /share/b/pub/mingus.help Mar 6, 2006 ****************

Mar 6, 2006 *********************************************************************** Mingus.eecs has been retired from service. (July 1, 2004) See http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/cgi-bin/clients.cgi?choice=13

s.berkeley.edu/cgi-bin/clients.cgi?choice=13 for a list of other Instructional login servers. See http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/software.html for reference to software that is available on the other servers. ****

us.eecs was an HP 64-bit N-Class system with (3) 440-MHz PA8500 cpus, 3-GB RAM and running HP-UX 11.0 (http://www.hp.com/). Mingus was donated to EECS Instruction by Hewlett-Packard in August 1999. EECS Instructional Support Group
99. EECS Instructional Support Group 386 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
